source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/GF(F4335-AW)승인원/에이치앤에스 하이텍  (ACF)/H&abyz Approval Sheet_TA1022_Rev0_21.01.26.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Delivery specification sheet for H&abyz ACF part number TA1022 manufactured by H&S Hightech.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines application, structure, characteristics, reliability tests, test methods, lot definition, packaging, inspection report, inspection equipment, and customer service flow for the ACF product.
keyPoints: Application is defined as Anisotropic Conductive Film (ACF) for PCB Bonding.
Manufacturer is H&S Hightech at 62-7, Techno 1-ro, Yuseong-gu, Daejeon, Korea.
Reliability tests include high temperature, low temperature, high temperature/high humidity, and temperature cycle conditions.
The document states to discuss with the ACF maker before using the product.

evidence.claim: The document is a Delivery Specification Sheet.
The customer is H&abyz.
The part name is ACF.
The part number is TA1022.
The manufacturer is H&S Hightech in Daejeon, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&S Hightech / 62-7, Techno 1-ro, Yuseong-gu, Daejeon, Korea

evidence.claim: Revision 0 was initially released on 21-01-26.
The specification defines Anisotropic Conductive Film for PCB bonding.
evidence.evidenceText: This specification defines as Anisotropic Conductive Film (ACF) for PCB Bonding.

evidence.claim: Users are instructed to discuss with the ACF maker before using the product.
evidence.evidenceText: ※ Please discuss with ACF maker before using product

evidence.claim: Packed shelf life is 6 months at -10℃ to 5℃.
Unpacked use condition is 25℃, 75%RH or below.
Before ACF is taken out to use, it should be kept for at least 1 hour to prevent dew condensation.
evidence.evidenceText: Before ACF is taken out to use, Please keep the ACF for at least 1 Hour to prevent dew condensation on the product.

evidence.claim: Reliability testing includes high temperature at 100℃ for 500 hours.
Reliability testing includes low temperature at -40℃ for 500 hours.
Reliability testing includes high temperature/high humidity at 85℃/85% for 500 hours.
Reliability testing includes temperature cycling from -40℃ to 100℃ for 500 cycles.
Reliability test specification for adhesion strength is greater than 1000 gf/㎝.
Reliability test specification for connection resistance is less than 1 ohm.
Reliability test specification for insulation resistance is greater than 10E9 ohm.
Main bonding condition for adhesion strength testing is 150℃, 4 seconds, 3 Mpa.
Packing specification includes product name, size, lot number, storage temperature, and expiration date on the label.
evidence.evidenceText: Specification of Label No Step 1. Product Name 2. Size 3. Lot No 4. Storage Temp 5. Expiration Date
